query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_articles,
  SUM(CASE WHEN content LIKE '%href=%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as articles_with_links,
  SUM(CASE WHEN content LIKE '%anrdoezrs.net%' OR content LIKE '%awin1.com%' OR content LIKE '%shareasale.com%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as articles_with_affiliate_links,
  SUM(CASE WHEN content LIKE '%24-7pressrelease%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as articles_with_broken_links
FROM articles 
WHERE status = 'published';

  SUM(CASE WHEN content LIKE '%href=%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as articles_with_links,
  SUM(CASE WHEN content LIKE '%anrdoezrs.net%' OR content LIKE '%awin1.com%' OR content LIKE '%shareasale.com%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as articles_with_affiliate_links,
  SUM(CASE WHEN content LIKE '%24-7pressrelease%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as articles_with_broken_links
FROM articles
